name: Barbecued Beef in Crusty Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except beef, rolls and cheese in a 1-quart casserole.
2. Cover and microwave on high (100%) until hot and bubbly, about 2 to 3 minutes. Stir.
3. Mix beef into the sauce.
4. Cover and microwave until beef is hot, 3 to 5 minutes.
5. Fill rolls with beef mixture and cheese slices and serve.
